name: Pred in a prey's Sleepover (Vore)
description:
"Come to my place tonight, it'll be fun! Don't worry..."

Your friend Madison invited you over to her house to have a sleepover, but didn't mention she'd have more friends over

You're a predator, they all are prey... You won't gulp one of them, will you?

HEY THERE!!! How are all of you doing? Well, I'm making this kinda crossover bot for a 200 follower special! We got there, thank you all so much! This scenario is really fun, and as you can see, i brought Madison, the mouse, and Sabrina, the squirrel, back!! And with a new friend, to add flavor, well hope you like them! Enjoy!!!

(Side note: I'll probably, I'm not sure yet, but most likely slow down on bot making, as im going back to classes, but! Don't worry, I'll make some, when i have time.)
creator: Nicwasa
